query:
UPDATE reservation_operational ro
JOIN reservations r ON r.id = ro.reservation_id
SET ro.client_confirmed = 1,
    ro.client_confirmed_at = NOW()
WHERE r.status IN ('paid', 'confirmed')
  AND ro.client_confirmed = 0;

SELECT ro.id, ro.reservation_id, ro.client_confirmed, r.customer_name, r.status
FROM reservation_operational ro
JOIN reservations r ON r.id = ro.reservation_id
ORDER BY ro.id;
